title: Product Opportunities
summary: Highest-impact product opportunities align with review-backed themes: exploration surfaces outside the taste bubble, freshness controls, segment-aware discovery, and reducing ad-driven interruption for free-tier explorers.

evidence.label: Easier music discovery (general)
evidence.support_line: 61 reviews across Reddit and Social Media

evidence.label: Dedicated discovery surfaces beyond Discover Weekly
evidence.support_line: 30 reviews across Social Media and Play Store

evidence.label: Curator- or human-driven discovery
evidence.support_line: 30 reviews across Social Media and Play Store

evidence.label: Better personalization that learns from feedback
evidence.support_line: 15 reviews across Reddit and Social Media

key_pain_points: High-impact discovery bets ranked by review evidence
root_causes: Ad disruption (free tier): Free-tier ads break the listening flow and undermine intentional exploration
Weak exploration tools: There are not enough surfaces, controls, or settings to actively go discover something new
Performance & stability: Crashes, lag, sync issues, or login failures interrupt listening before discovery can happen
affected_segments: Discovery Seeker: Hard to find new artists or genres
Playlist User: Discover Weekly / curated playlists feel stale
Heavy Listener: Discover Weekly / curated playlists feel stale
Casual Listener: Ads disrupt the discovery flow
Premium User: Discover Weekly / curated playlists feel stale
Free User: Ads disrupt the discovery flow
unmet_needs: Need dedicated discovery surfaces beyond Discover Weekly
Need better personalization that learns from feedback
Need fresher and more accurate recommendations
product_focus_areas: High-impact discovery bets ranked by review evidence
recommended_actions: Rank opportunities by review volume, segment impact, and feasibility.
Fund two discovery bets per quarter with pre-defined success metrics.
Close the loop with users when shipped features address top review themes.
